data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Re-plan support when new events arrive', but the evidence does not provide any concrete details or examples of how the system handles new events and adjusts plans accordingly. The linked use case mentions the need for re-planning but does not demonstrate this functionality through API reads or persisted state checks. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of how the system re-plans when new events arrive.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
